blocker: No proven referral signup-save exists yet. Do the tester batch before changing ads again.

firstAction.title: Send 3 clean signup tests
firstAction.why: Paid and referral views exist, but no completed signup-save event exists. This proves or isolates the Google signup path.
firstAction.copy:
I need 3 clean WorldCup26 signup tests now.

Please send this to three trusted people with different Google accounts. They should open it on a fresh phone/browser, accept the invite, continue with Google, and pick 3 teams. Do not pay.

Ask each tester to reply with one of these:
1. "joined + picked teams"
2. screenshot of the exact screen where it stops

Code 26BC4B90CB:
https://worldcup26.world/login?ref=26BC4B90CB&utm_source=whatsapp-testers&utm_medium=warm-contact&utm_campaign=worldcup26_warm_contact_sprint&utm_content=clean_signup_test
firstAction.logAfterRealSend: node campaign-public-channel-attempts.mjs --add --owner "Memo" --platform "WhatsApp testers" --channel "clean signup test batch" --status "sent" --attempt-url "https://worldcup26.world/login?ref=26BC4B90CB&utm_source=whatsapp-testers&utm_medium=warm-contact&utm_campaign=worldcup26_warm_contact_sprint&utm_content=clean_signup_test" --detail "Sent clean signup test to <N> trusted testers from <account> at YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm EEST; asked each to accept invite, Google signup, pick 3 teams, and reply with success or blocking screenshot; code 26BC4B90CB included" --next-action "run campaign-signup-conversion-audit.mjs after tester replies or after 15 minutes"

secondAction.title: Run one X OpenClaw reply from each worker
secondAction.why: The droplets can find football conversations and prepare replies; proof begins only after a real reply URL or precise private note.

firstAction.targetSignal: People already talking about favorites or dark horses.
firstAction.copy:
Good football question. I am asking people for exactly 3 World Cup picks before the event starts.

You can save your 3 teams free and see your private points preview here:
https://worldcup26.world/login?ref=26BC4B90CB&utm_source=x&utm_medium=manual-reply&utm_campaign=worldcup26_football_openclaw&utm_content=world-cup-2026-predictions_three-picks

Code: 26BC4B90CB
firstAction.proofCommand: node campaign-public-channel-attempts.mjs --add --owner "Dexter" --platform "X" --channel "football manual replies" --status "replied" --attempt-url "<real-x-reply-url-or-private-note>" --detail "Manual X reply from david2015bestai@gmail.com at YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm EEST; target=<@handle or tweet URL>; search='world cup 2026 predictions'; code 26BC4B90CB and WorldCup26 link included" --next-action "watch replies, then run campaign-referral-activity.mjs after 15 minutes"
